Cenaculum

Cenaculum 2027

Save the date: June 14-19, 2027

In Burlington, WI. More details to follow as the date approaches.

27

Cenaculum 2027

Notate diem: diebus XIV-XIX Iunii MMXXVII.

Plura mox, cum dies propius advenerit, nuntiabuntur.

About

What Cenaculum is

A retreat built around prayer, the liturgy, and life together in Latin.

Prayer and liturgy

Mass, the divine office, and common prayer shape the day. Cenaculum is meant to make room for worship without turning the retreat into a rush.

Latin all day

Latin is the ordinary language of Cenaculum. We ask participants to use it throughout the retreat except in emergencies or matters of real necessity.

Shared rhythm

Meals, talks, games, walks, and quiet time are all part of the retreat. The structure is steady, but the atmosphere is relaxed.

De Cenaculo

Quid Cenaculum sit

Recessus circa precationem, liturgiam, atque vitam communem Latine ducendam constitutus.

Precatio et liturgia

Missa, officium divinum, atque oratio communis diem informant. Cenaculum ita ordinatur ut cultui divino locus largus detur, sine tamen festinatione.

Latine per diem

Latina lingua ordinaria Cenaculi est. Petimus ut ea per totum Cenaculum utamini, nisi in extremis vel in rebus valde necessariis.

Ritus communes

Ientaculum, prandium, cena, sermones, ludi, deambulationes, atque tempora quietis omnia ad recessum pertinent. Ordo stabilis est; animus tamen remissus manet.

Communication

Contact us directly

Shared retreat email

FamiliaSanctiHieronymi@outlook.com

Communicatio

Nos directe pete

Quamquam licet epistulam electronicam ad inscriptionem communem mittere, multo melius est Jacobum aut Jacobulum directe contingere, quia frequentius rationes electronicas proprias inspicimus.

Inscriptio electronica communis

FamiliaSanctiHieronymi@outlook.com

Location and travel

Where it is and how to get there

Location

2457 Browns Lake Drive
Burlington, WI 53105

(262) 661-4083
retreatcenter@icksp.org
shrcburlington.org

There is plenty of parking on site.

Locus et iter

Ubi sit et quomodo perveniendum sit

Locus

2457 Browns Lake Drive
Burlington, WI 53105

(262) 661-4083
retreatcenter@icksp.org
shrcburlington.org

Satis multa loca stativa ibi sunt.

Iter ad locum

Iter facere ad locum ante initium Cenaculi, et ex loco post finem Cenaculi, omnino tuum officium est. Id est, non habemus vehicula aut gubernatores quibus possimus te ex variis locis, exempli gratia ex aëriportibus, vehiculo excipere.

Quaeso ergo quam primum dic Jacobulo Perry consilium itineris tui, exempli gratia urbem et tempus volatus aeronavis, ut in consiliis communibus adiuvare possit.

Completorium

Register

Ready to join us?

Registration for Cenaculum 2027 is not yet open. Check back later!

Inscriptio

Paratus esne nobis interesse?

Si Cenaculo interesse vis aut de inscriptione quaestiones habes, Jacobum vel Jacobulum directe pete. Ad gradus practicos te adiuvabimus.

FAQ

Common questions

Is it fully in Latin?

Yes, the entire event is conducted entirely in Latin: talks, liturgy, meals, social conversations, etc. We ask participants to only speak Latin throughout the Cenaculum except in emergencies or matters of real necessity. Sometimes, of course, there is a good reason to use a word or two in another language. For instance, sometimes a talk will mention a Greek or Hebrew word. Or sometimes you won't know the Latin word for something, so you can judiciously ask "quomodo dicitur 'salad?'"

What should I pack?

In addition to the clothes, hygiene items, medications, and other personal necessities for a week-long stay, you will likely want to bring a rosary, a notebook, a pen, a Latin dictionary, and perhaps a Latin book you would enjoy reading during quiet breaks. In addition, we customarily put on a low-key talent show on the final evening, so consider any props or musical instrument you might need for your talent.

What if I have dietary restrictions or food allergies?

For special dietary needs, you will have a chance to indicate the details on the registration form. You can also reach out to Abbe Jeffrey at retreatcenter@icksp.org with more detailed questions regarding food.

FAQ

Quaestiones communes

Qua lingua loqui debeo?

Quaeso per totum Cenaculum tantum Latine loquimini, nisi in extremis vel in rebus valde necessariis.

Quid mecum apportare debeo?

Rosarium, paginas vel librum ad notas scribendas, lexicon vel alios libros Latinos, atque instrumentum musicale, si ad ultimam vespertinam celebrationem adiuvabit.

Quid si cibo peculiari aut auxilio itineris egeo?

Si cibo peculiari vobis opus est sanitatis causa, statim dicite Abbati Jeffrey ad retreatcenter@icksp.org. De consiliis itineris, Jacobulum Perry quam primum certiorem facite.
